content: Setup: copy repo KN10, install deps, run load_context, read Tier-0 + handoff
Baseline: seed_reset (119/0/0), verify app loads + login works
P0-A: Fix PO/PR/RFQ→PO (and TRF/SJ/FKT) number generators count+1 → max-based (deletion-safe)
P1-C: Frontend Multi-Level Approval — render approval_chain, role-aware approve button, level progress
P0-B: Resolve AP dualism (owner decision needed)
Run full gates + testing_agent_v3 E2E for changes
